│ >_ OpenAI Codex (v0.135.0)            │
│                                       │
│ model:     gpt-5.5   /model to change │
│ directory: ~/git/Replikanti           │
╰───────────────────────────────────────╯



› write a 20-line poem, then on the very last line print the token ZZEND9 by itself


• Morning folds its quiet map
  Across the waking street
  Windows catch the early gold
  And scatter it in heat
  Footsteps bloom on rain-dark stone
  Buses sigh and start
  Someone hums a half-known tune
  With coffee in their heart
  Clouds drift like unwritten notes
  Above the market square
  Every door becomes a choice
  Every breath a prayer
  By noon the city lifts its voice
  In wires, wheels, and glass
  Even shadows learn to move
  And let the daylight pass
  At dusk the lamps remember stars
  The river keeps its bend
  Night arrives with open hands
  ZZEND9
